hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "npm.cmd run lint; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run test:unit; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run test:ui; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run build; exit $LASTEXITCODE"

python -c "import os,re,sys; tool_input=(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT') or os.environ.get('CODEX_TOOL_INPUT') or '').lower(); patterns=[r'rm\\s+-rf', r'git\\s+push\\s+--force', r'git\\s+reset\\s+--hard', r'drop\\s+table']; blocked=any(re.search(p, tool_input) for p in patterns); sys.stderr.write('BLOCKED: 위험한 명령이 감지되었습니다.\\n') if blocked else None; sys.exit(1 if blocked else 0)"
